title: agnus-castus negundo
intro: Agnus-castus negundo, also known as Chaste tree or Vitex negundo, is a plant native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia, known for its long, pointed leaves and purple flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Agnus-castus negundo include its ability to regulate menstrual cycles, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and support digestive health, making it a popular herbal remedy for women's health issues. Agnus-castus negundo can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
